title: Boomsticks
description: A datapack with sticks to cause big explosions.
body:
# Boomsticks
### Report bugs on GitHub!
## Usage
1. Install to your minecraft world
2. Be sure you have OP to get the sticks
3. Run
   - `/function boomstick:info` for info and getting all sticks
   - `/function boomstick:give` to get all sticks
   - `/function boomstick:give/<tiny/small/mid/big/giant>` to get a specific stick
## Features
- Supports Multiplayer
- Multiple Strenghts
- Lag
## Info
### What does this pack do?
Boomsticks contains sticks you can use to create a explosion. Multiple explosion strengths exist as different sticks. (Shown in the Modrinth Gallery)
### What is this useful for?
- Stresstesting your PC
- Being a good server admin and redecorating the house of someone you like
- Look! Cool big hole
